title: Assessing the Costs of Tariffs on the US ICT Industry: Modeling US-China Tariffs

summary.about: The economic cost to the United States of escalating barriers to ICT trade with China.
summary.audience: U.S. trade officials, technology companies and supply-chain leaders.
summary.method: Simulates tariff-escalation scenarios modeled on U.S. Section 301 measures.
summary.insights: Tariffs reduce ICT competitiveness, do little to restore manufacturing and could cost U.S. GDP about $1 trillion over ten years.
